nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Located behind the corpus callosum, the Pineal Gland regulates the sleep and wake cycles.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Kael opens his eyes and finds himself in an unfamiliar world. You arrive at the Pineal Gland, the realm hidden behind the corpus callosum that governs the cycle of sleep and wakefulness.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Where am I...? What is this place?

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Roam around the world and explore your surroundings. The unfamiliar yet surreal atmosphere leaves you feeling lost, as if wandering through a dream.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Kael? How did you get here?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: Slight tremor.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who are you?! How do you know my name?

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You see a vibrant pink creature standing in a surreal world unlike anything you have ever seen.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: This has to be a dream...

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: I guess, technically, it is...? I'm Rona, an Energeon.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Energeon...? What's that?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The ground shakes violently.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Pieces of the environment begin to crumble. At this rate, the world may not last much longer. Rona seems to have an idea.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Ah! You being here must mean something! Stop asking questions and come with me!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Follow Rona.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: A pathway ahead is blocked by tangled veins.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Dang it! The tremors must've caused these veins to collapse.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The bushes rustle violently. Rona flinches in fear, only to find Murial emerging from them.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Argh... This place is really falling apart.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: You scared me!

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who is that?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Kael?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: That's Murial!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: How did he get here?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Stop with the questions! Can't you see this world is falling apart? Murial, clear those veins, will you?

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Use Murial's power to lift and clear the fallen veins.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Woah... What exactly are you guys?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Let's just say... our world is very different from yours.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Now, let's go!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Follow Rona.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You find a purple Energeon kneeling in the middle of the path, clutching her head in pain.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Keiko!

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: My head hurts so much... It's ringing...

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: It's getting worse...

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What is happening...?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Are you okay?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I'm okay now...

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Kael?

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: How does everyone know me?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: I don't know how you got here, but... you're inside your own mind.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: We are your Energeons. We represent your energies, Kael.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What...?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: It's going to be hard to explain. You probably wouldn't understand it yet. But what you need to know is that this world is falling apart because you haven't been taking care of yourself.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Calm down, Murial...

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: I—

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Guys... I hear it!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Then let's go.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Follow Keiko.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: After walking for a while, the group meets a blue Energeon standing before an ancient shrine.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Feanor?

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I think I found the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Yes! The resonance is coming from here!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Before you stand three floating stone altars with empty crystal sockets. A cracked crystal lies on the ground beneath them.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I think this shrine is the key to restoring the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I think I can do something with this!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Keiko concentrates her power, attempting to restore the shrine.
It can’t be fixed if the crystals are missing

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who is that?

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: A Rabbit is sitting at a floating table, it feels so familiar…

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Ferry?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Oh wonderful Kael, you recognize me!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Ferry?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: That is the Somnolume Shrine that controls Kael’s sleeping cycle. Without its crystals, it is nothing more than an empty shell.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Why is it gone?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Take a look at your eyes dear… you’re not sleeping well, aren’t you?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: A violent quake shakes the entire area.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The cracked crystal shatters even further. Dark fissures spread across the shrine as fragments of the world begin drifting into the void.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: How do we fix it?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Of course by collecting all the crystals that is who knows where…

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I could feel their energy…

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Seems like your friend there has a clue on where the crystals are, good luck finding it, it’s not going to be so easy

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Find the Somnolume Crystals (Somnia Seed, Crescent Tear, Dreampearl).
